infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Tasker needs your location to find nearby service providers.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Tasker uses your location to track provider arrival and dispatch emergency services.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Tasker needs camera access to capture job photos and credential documents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Tasker needs photo library access to upload credential documents.
